hooks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.Visible = $true; $n.ShowBalloonTip(8000, 'EnglishUp Assistant', 'Claude need you', 'Info'); Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $n.Dispose()"
echo [EnglishUp] File da duoc cap nhat: %TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH%
echo [EnglishUp] Chuan bi chay lenh bash...
